title: Feature
description: A life-as-code feature document that captures the full lifecycle of a product/engineering feature, from problem statement through decisions, implementation, and annotations.

featureKey.description: Unique identifier for this feature. Auto-generated by lac-cli.

title.description: Short human-readable title for this feature.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the feature.

problem.description: The human problem this feature solves. Written from the user's perspective.
examples: Users need a secure way to log in and manage their accounts.

analysis.description: Free-form analysis of the problem space, research findings, or prior art.

decisions.description: Architectural or design decisions made during the development of this feature.

implementation.description: Implementation notes, approach summary, or links to relevant code.

knownLimitations.description: Known limitations, trade-offs, or tech debt introduced by this feature.

tags.description: Free-form tags for search and categorisation.

annotations.description: Time-stamped annotations attached to this feature by team members.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version number for future migration tooling. When absent, tools assume version 1.

owner.description: The person or team responsible for this feature.

successCriteria.description: Plain-language definition of done for this feature.

userGuide.description: Plain-language guide for end users — what the feature does and how to use it. Not acceptance criteria. Written from the user's perspective.

priority.description: Priority level 1–5 (1 = highest). Controls sibling ordering.

revisions.description: Append-only log of intent-critical field changes with author and reason.

superseded_by.description: featureKey of the feature that supersedes this one.

superseded_from.description: featureKeys of features that this one supersedes.

merged_into.description: featureKey of the feature this one was merged into.

merged_from.description: featureKeys of features that were merged into this one.

componentFile.description: Relative path to the primary source file that implements this feature, e.g. "src/components/FeatureCard.tsx".

npmPackages.description: npm packages this feature directly depends on at runtime.

publicInterface.description: Exported props, function signatures, or API surface that consumers of this feature depend on.

externalDependencies.description: Cross-feature runtime dependencies not captured by lineage — featureKeys or relative file paths.

lastVerifiedDate.description: YYYY-MM-DD date when this feature.json was last confirmed accurate.

codeSnippets.description: Critical one-liners worth preserving verbatim — glob patterns, API calls, architectural pivots.

alternativesConsidered.description: Other options that were evaluated but not chosen.

date.description: ISO 8601 date when this decision was recorded (YYYY-MM-DD).

author.description: Name or identifier of the person who wrote this annotation.

date.description: ISO 8601 date string when this annotation was created.
ISO 8601 date when this revision was recorded (YYYY-MM-DD).

description.description: What this export does or when to use it.

label.description: Short human label, e.g. "glob pattern", "API call".

snippet.description: The actual one-liner or short code block to preserve verbatim.

Lineage.description: Parent/child relationships between features (e.g. spawned sub-features).

children.description: featureKeys of child features spawned from this one.

oneOf.description: Why this feature was spawned from its parent.
